about.headline: Delivering growth, empowering stores.
about.desc: Experience the world's most sophisticated multi-store e-commerce platform. Discover elite local brands, build exquisite digital storefronts, and experience delivery precision that redefines excellence.
about.marquee: Accept payments from every major bank in Cambodia

features.headline: Simple, powerful tools to launch your store
features.desc: No complex setups, just clean, high-performance features designed to run your business operations smoothly.
features.step1_desc: Add products with images, prices, descriptions, and categories. Organize exactly how you want.
features.step2_desc: Get a unique URL for your menu. Share on social media, print as QR code, or send directly.
features.step3_desc: Your menu looks perfect on any device. Phone, tablet, or desktop - always beautiful.
features.step4_desc: Accept orders directly from your menu. Customers can add items to cart and checkout easily.
features.step5_desc: Upload your logo, cover image, and choose your theme color to match your brand.
features.step6_desc: Generate beautiful QR codes for your menu. Print and place on tables for contactless access.

join.headline: Are you a food vendor? Launch your storefront now!
join.desc: Join the elite Prime Website food network. Access a premium customer base, digitize your culinary offerings, and master your daily operations with our sophisticated dashboard.

pricing.headline: Start free and upgrade as you grow.
pricing.desc: No hidden fees, no surprises. Pure performance pricing.

stores.headline: Featured Prime Outlets
stores.desc: Directly access elite store storefronts powered by Prime technology. Seamlessly order from the city's finest establishments.
stores.empty_desc: New elite partners are joining the network daily.

register.desc_profile: Create your administrative credentials for the Prime Website ecosystem.
register.desc_outlet: Setup the storefront details that will represent your brand on the Prime platform.
